creator: nork@cityfujisawa.ne.jp
text:
When I run mergemaster command, /etc/ppp/ppp.conf will be updated.
But I connect to Internet with ADSL, and set to /etc/ppp/ppp.conf
for ADSL.

Fix: 

change ,install configuration file, from /etc/ppp/ppp.conf to /etc/ppp/ppp.conf.sample

	OR

add -conf argumenet in /usr/sbin/ppp command

Please.
